Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell
At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value
Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters)

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root Required: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element Required: Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell Required: At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value Required: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters) Reference DOM (Table layout form): Form laid out as HTML table with labels in td cells Reference DOM (Definition list form): Fields structured as dl/dt/dd definition list pairs Reference DOM (Split span label fragments): Label text split across multiple span elements Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: shadow-host, aria-label-only, iframe-apply, readonly-prefill, duplicate-name-attrs. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: definition list dl/dt/dd label pairs. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Table layout form; Definition list form; Split span label fragments.
